---
name: Bug or report
about: Report a bug, broken link, documentation problem, routing question, or small operational issue.
title: "[Report] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What happened

Describe the problem or question.

## Where

Link the repository, file, section, issue, pull request, or page.

## Expected result

What did you expect to happen or find?

## Actual result

What happened instead?

## Suggested fix

Optional: describe the change you think would resolve this.

## Sensitive information check

- [ ] I have not included secrets, credentials, private contacts, exploit details, or confidential institutional information.
